data.content: Implementation review + re-land: cherry-picked orphaned commit 1ceb335 onto main. swapPoolAgent helper in agent-pool.ts replaces agentId in-place preserving weight/order, guards against no-op and duplicate swaps. UI adds dual-select swap controls per step in settings-pools-section.tsx. All 24 agent-pool tests pass. Lint clean (warnings only). TypeCheck clean.
